commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Discord `mediaUrls` propagation through action and outbound send paths, batches uploads up to ten files per Discord message, splits overflow batches, tightens reply/retry behavior, and updates docs/tests.

PR surface: Source +225, Tests +311, Docs +2. Total +538 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main and v2026.6.10 route Discord uploads through scalar `mediaUrl` helpers that build one-file REST bodies. I did not run a live Discord round trip in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-owned live Discord proof plus maintainer review, not a narrow automated code repair.
